subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-12-01
subcodes.first_line: Today a number of people came to Me and asked, “Why do You not leave the city?”... Sulayman Khan and Mírza Fathu'llah were candle-pierced, that is, they were pierced with bayonets
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمعی آمده بودند و میگفتند چرا از شهر بیرون نمیروید بمن اعتراض میکنند که با اینهمه اضطراب و اغتشاش
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
